sentences.target: On reçoit un flot de messages.

translations.fr: On reçoit un flot de messages.
translations.en: We're getting a flood of messages.
translations.es: Estamos recibiendo un aluvión de mensajes.
translations.de: Wir bekommen eine Flut an Nachrichten.
translations.it: Stiamo ricevendo una valanga di messaggi.
translations.pt: Estamos recebendo uma enxurrada de mensagens.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nhận được rất nhiều tin nhắn.
translations.nl: We krijgen een stortvloed aan berichten.
translations.hi: हमें संदेशों की बाढ़ आ रही है.
translations.nb: Vi får en strøm av meldinger.
translations.sv: Vi får en ström av meddelanden.
translations.da: Vi får en strøm af beskeder.
translations.ja: メッセージが殺到しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; here the grammatical subject of the verb 'reçoit'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object ('un flot de messages').
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'flot'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the noun phrase functioning as direct object of 'reçoit'.
Preposition introducing a complement ('messages') specifying the content of 'flot'.
Common noun, plural; complement of 'flot' governed by 'de'.

sentences.target: Le flot de voitures ne s'arrête pas.
sentences.reading: /lə flo də vwa.tyʁ nə saʁɛt pa/

translations.fr: Le flot de voitures ne s'arrête pas.
translations.ipa: /lə flo də vwa.tyʁ nə saʁɛt pa/
translations.en: The flow of cars doesn't stop.
translations.es: El flujo de coches no se detiene.
translations.de: Der Strom der Autos reißt nicht ab.
translations.it: Il flusso di auto non si ferma.
translations.pt: O fluxo de carros não para.
translations.vi: Dòng xe cộ không dừng lại.
translations.nl: De stroom auto's houdt niet op.
translations.hu: Az autók áradata nem áll meg.
translations.hi: गाड़ियों का प्रवाह रुकता नहीं है.
translations.el: Η ροή των αυτοκινήτων δεν σταματά.
translations.sv: Strömmen av bilar tar inte slut.
translations.ro: Fluxul de mașini nu se oprește.
translations.ja: 車の流れが止まりません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'flot'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject noun phrase.
Preposition linking 'flot' to its complement 'voitures' (type/content).
Common noun, plural; complement of 'flot' introduced by 'de'.
Negation particle; first element of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas' around the verb.
Pronominal verb (clitic 'se' elided as 's''), present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate of the clause.
Negative adverb; completes the discontinuous negation with 'ne'.

sentences.target: Ils forment un flot en sortant du métro.
sentences.reading: /il fɔʁm œ̃ flo ɑ̃ sɔʁtɑ̃ dy metʁo/

translations.fr: Ils forment un flot en sortant du métro.
translations.ipa: /il fɔʁm œ̃ flo ɑ̃ sɔʁtɑ̃ dy metʁo/
translations.en: They form a stream as they exit the metro.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们从地铁里蜂拥而出。
translations.yue: 佢哋由地鐵出口蜂擁而出。
translations.pt: Eles saem do metrô em massa.
translations.vi: Họ đổ ra khỏi tàu điện ngầm như một dòng người.
translations.hi: वे मेट्रो से उमड़कर बाहर आते हैं.
translations.ja: 彼らは地下鉄からどっと出てきます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of 'forment'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; takes 'un flot' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'flot'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'forment'.
Preposition introducing a gerund clause ('en sortant'); expresses manner/time ('while/by leaving').
Present participle used in a gerund construction; head of the non-finite clause introduced by 'en'.
Contracted form of 'de' + 'le'; preposition introducing the complement 'métro' indicating origin.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Je gère mal le flot de mails.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʒɛʁ mal lə flo də mɛl/

translations.fr: Je gère mal le flot de mails.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʒɛʁ mal lə flo də mɛl/
translations.en: I manage the flood of emails poorly.
translations.es: Gestiono mal la avalancha de correos.
translations.de: Ich komme mit der E-Mail-Flut schlecht zurecht.
translations.it: Gestisco male la valanga di email.
translations.ko: 이메일이 밀려오는 걸 잘 처리하지 못해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我不太能应付海量邮件。
translations.yue: 我唔太識應付鋪天蓋地嘅電郵。
translations.ru: Я плохо справляюсь с потоком электронных писем.
translations.pt: Eu lido mal com a enxurrada de e-mails.
translations.he: אני מתקשה להתמודד עם מבול המיילים.
translations.tr: E-posta seliyle pek iyi başa çıkamıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi xử lý không tốt lượng email dồn dập.
translations.ar: أدير سيل الرسائل الإلكترونية بشكل سيئ.
translations.nl: Ik ga slecht om met de stortvloed aan e-mails.
translations.uk: Я погано справляюся з потоком електронних листів.
translations.hi: मैं ईमेल की बाढ़ को ठीक से संभाल नहीं पाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Słabo sobie radzę z zalewem e-maili.
translations.id: Saya kurang mampu menangani banjir email.
translations.ja: メールの洪水をうまく処理できていません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'gère'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; governs the direct object 'le flot de mails'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'gère'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'flot'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition introducing the complement 'mails' specifying the content/type of 'flot'.
Borrowed noun (anglicism), plural; complement of 'flot' with 'de'. The plural 's' is typically not pronounced.
